MYSQLABOUT IDENTITY MANAGEMENT
As our society becomes electronically connected to form one big global community, person identification has become an integral part 
of the infrastructure needed for diverse business sectors like transportation, entertainment, law enforcement, security, access control, border control, government, communication etc. Use of cards, passwords etc. for identity verification can no longer suffice as there is always the risk of sharing the information with others. It has thus become necessary to have a reliable person identification system that ensures security, confidentiality and integrity of the organization’s information.
Techno Brain is a leading IT Solutions, IT Training and BPO / ITES Services Company with operations in Africa, USA, India, 
UK and UAE. Appraised at CMMI Level 5, Techno Brain is committed to deliver high quality, cost eﬀective and oﬀ-the-shelf solutions to Governments, NGOs and Private organizations across the globe.

ELECTRONIC VISA / 
TRAVEL SYSTEMS
Why eVisa?
Countries who have implemented an e-Visa system have benefitted fromElectronic Travel Systems (ETS): The 
automated process for the lodgement, 
acceptance and verification of a 
passenger’s authorization to travel to a 
State, in lieu of the standard counterfoil 
paper visa. 
The purpose of implementing an ETS is to expedite the pre-
vetting and acceptance of low risk passengers into a country, 
while providing a secure method for applicants, governments, 
and airlines to verify the acceptance for travel. Often countries 
implement an ETS requirement in lieu of a visa requirement. 
This can facilitate travel by alleviating visa requirements, while 
still providing an adequate level of border security in the form of 
electronic registration and personal data submission. The Electronic Visa (e-Visa) has emerged as one of the most 
innovative services implemented in the area of e-Governance, 
tourism development and people-to-people contacts.
Saving 24 – 30 working days on administrative issues 
related to the visa process such as scheduling appointments, 
receiving applicants at the visa office, inputting data from visa 
applications into the visa system, scanning and saving supporting 
documents, printing visa stickers, and returning passports to 
applicants. 
Increase in tourism traffic to the country by 35% - 
translating into millions of dollars of secondary revenue and 
employment growth in the countryReduction in cost of visa issuance and management - 
translating into additional revenues for the government and the 
country
• Implementing an eVisa system helps reduce cost of consular 
operation
• Governments are not forced to open high-maintenance 
embassies or consulates 
By collecting visa fees online and before an intended travel 
– countries are able to streamline fraud and mismanagement – 
and generate greater revenues through the issuance of Visas
